description: During a routine monitoring visit, a critical data entry error was discovered: the Week 4 Follow-up Vital Signs data for Subject DM-102 was accidentally entered into Subject DM-103's electronic casebook in the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). DM-103 has not yet reached Week 4. As the Clinical Data Manager, remediate this in OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!) by removing the incorrectly scheduled Week 4 Follow-up event and data from Subject DM-103 using the reason 'Entered on wrong subject'. Schedule a new Week 4 Follow-up event for Subject DM-102 with the start date 2024-03-10 and enter the recovered Vital Signs data: Systolic BP 142, Diastolic BP 88, Heart Rate 76, Body Temp 37.1, and Weight 84.5. Mark the CRF as complete. If the Vital Signs CRF is missing from the system, a template is available at /home/ga/vital_signs_crf.xls for upload.
